ood_fallback_value: When the request is combat-sports/martial-arts adjacent but lacks specifics (no named disciplines, schedule, or booking intent), prefer this pack's grounded dark-athletic grammar but DROP fight-specific atoms (schedule matrix, mat-zone SVG, program tabs) and reuse only the generic shell (sticky_nav, hero_shell, booking_flow, faq_disclosure, mobile_sticky_cta). If the vertical is clearly NOT combat-sports (medical, legal, SaaS, beauty), do not route here; fall back to a neutral website anchor.
conflicts_to_avoid: Do not co-route with ironblood_fight_gym_black_red_v1 in the same generation: both are dark combat-sports anchors and blending them produces a red/copper palette clash and duplicated hero/timeline grammar. Pick ONE combat-sports anchor per build.
Do not mix with light/editorial or pastel beauty/medspa anchors; the dark matte system will fight a light surface and wash out copper contrast.
Do not pull belt/record/championship motifs from any source — this pack is proof-safe by design and must not inherit fabricated credentials.
Do not import external-font or raster-hero atoms; this donor is strictly self-contained and image-free.
recommended_weight_notes: Strong (high weight) for explicit combat-sports / MMA / striking / grappling / fight-gym homepage, schedule, or trial-booking requests, especially when a dark, premium, grounded (non-broadcast) tone is asked for. Medium weight as a secondary donor for dark industrial/athletic landing pages that want a real schedule matrix, ARIA program tabs, or a validated booking form. Low/zero weight for light, soft, family, wellness, or non-sport verticals. When both this and ironblood match, choose by palette/tone cue: copper + 'grounded/beginner/craft' -> this pack; red + 'severe/elite/fight-camp' -> ironblood.
